design_plan: rng=42; AIDA pass; hero max-width 1120px yields 2–3 lines; grid-auto-flow:dense verified in .compare-grid and .bento; competitor labels swept; primary/secondary CTA contrast checked.
headline: Super vs Gemini — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Gemini. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Gemini

summary: Gemini is pushing browser‑native computer use into a fast, mainstream model. Super is built for people who want durable, repeatable computer‑use workflows — with a reusable computer‑use cache so the second run is cheaper and faster than the first.
